name: Chocolate-Covered Pecan Fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix powdered sugar, shortening, and margarine until thoroughly combined. Stir in 1-1/2 cups flour and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Press the mixture firmly into a rectangular dish measuring 11 x 7 x 1-1/2 inches.
2. Microwave uncovered on high for 4 to 6 minutes, rotating the dish 1/4 turn after 2 minutes, until no longer doughy.
3. In another bowl, mix the remaining ingredients and spread over the hot layer. Microwave uncovered for 6 minutes, rotating the dish 1/4 turn after 3 minutes. Immediately sprinkle warm bars with chocolate chips.
4. Continue microwaving uncovered about 1 minute or until the chocolate is melted and spreads easily over the bars. Cool completely before sprinkling with powdered sugar. Cut into about 3 x 1-inch bars.
28 BARS; 180 CALORIES PER BAR.
